title: The influence of agricultural tillage practices on soil biodiversity
author: Robert Hanner
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.efmbbk6

steps.title: Primer removal
steps.instruction: Primer removal : Primers were trimmed from the raw reads using Cutadapt cutadapt Linux https://github.com/marcelm/cutadapt/ Marcel Martin

steps.title: Read processing
steps.instruction: Read processing: The UPARSE pipeline was chosen to quality filter and cluster all reads

steps.title: Quality filter fastq_filter -fastq_maxee 1 trim...
steps.instruction: Quality filter fastq_filter -fastq_maxee 1 trim all reads to a common length for each gene

steps.title: Label samples
steps.instruction: Label samples : sample labels were added to each sequence header with -relabel command

steps.title: ITS2 extraction
steps.instruction: ITS2 extraction : For ITS2, the program ITSx was used to extract the ITS2 region from flanking 5.8S

steps.title: OTU table construction
steps.instruction: OTU table construction : map all sample labelled reads onto OTU file for each gene

steps.title: Used BLAST to identify all OTUs...
steps.instruction: Used BLAST to identify all OTUs against the SILVA_123 (16S, 18S, AMF), UNITE (ITS2) and Genbank (CO1)

steps.title: Used MEGAN5 to pick most correct...
steps.instruction: Used MEGAN5 to pick most correct ID using LCA algorith (LCA% 75)

steps.title: Map tax ids onto OTUS in table format search_exact (UPARSE)
steps.instruction: Map tax ids onto OTUS in table format search_exact (UPARSE)

steps.title: Statistical analysis
steps.instruction: Statistical analysis : load OTU table with tax ids into STAMP (program)
